content:
Pluto in Libra: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Pluto in Libra blends the archetypal drive of Pluto (where you transform, face power and shadow, and regenerate) with the Air, cardinal nature of Libra.

  • Planet: Pluto — transformation, power, death-rebirth, depth, obsession
  • Sign: Libra (Air/Cardinal) — balance, relationship, beauty, justice, harmony

Eastern Perspective
